name: send-sms
description: Send an SMS text message to a phone number. Provider handles carrier transport. Message is plain text — Claude-powered providers can handle formatting if needed.

tools.name: send_sms
tools.description: Send an SMS message to a phone number

to.description: Recipient phone number with country code (e.g., +15551234567)

hints.description: Optional sideband dict. Providers read keys they care about, ignore the rest. Known keys documented in hints registry below.

source.description: Name of the plugin or system that generated the SMS
